title: Review quiescence loop implementation
description: Review all changes across the quiescence loop feature: parser.py flag addition, command_run loop restructure, telemetry event refactor, four new tests, and CLAUDE.md documentation. Verify correctness, test coverage, and that no regressions were introduced. Check that the final JSON summary shape is unchanged and the loop exit condition is sound.
acceptance_criteria: All developer changes in parser.py and run.py are reviewed and approved.
Four new tests are reviewed for correctness and coverage of edge cases.
CLAUDE.md documentation accurately reflects implemented behaviour.
No unintended side-effects, security issues, or regressions identified.
conflict_risks: None — only parser.py modified; no overlap with other in-progress beads.
